subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which city served as the capital of the Chauhan dynasty?
question_hi: चौकनी समुद्र (Chauhan dynasty) के राजधानी के कितने शहरों में थे?
explanation_en: Jodhpur served as the capital of the Chauhan dynasty during the rule of Prithviraj Chauhan. The Chauhans ruled from the 12th to the 14th century and established their capital at Jodhpur.
